generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign tech puts us at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-sufficient—it's about protecting our families and communities. When we control our critical infrastructure, we reduce vulnerabilities that bad actors could exploit. It's not about isolation; it's about smart, responsible independence. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
